Voxel World

Click to play (Pointer Lock)

Move: WASD | Look: Mouse | Jump: Space | Fly: Double Space

Break: Left Click | Place: Right Click | Select: 1-8 or Scroll | Inventory: E | Talk: F

Eat Apple: R | Debug Pane: U

+
Mode: Walk
X: 0 Y: 0 Z: 0
FPS: 0
Coins: 0
Health
Inventory (30 slots) - click a slot to map to active hotbar index
Debug Controls
